text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Narita Brian on the training track
talking to some younger runners.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, you. C'mere for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eek! We're so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Are we in your way?! Sorry! We'll move right now!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What's going on? Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Nope. Just wanted to talk about that thing from
earlier.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: "Thing from earlier"? You wanted to talk to us?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, indeed. An event is scheduled to take place
at school soon. We intend to conduct a special
race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We've been searching for test runners for it as
part of our preparations.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's what this is about? Sorry for jumping
to conclusions earlier...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's fine. So, would you mind helping us?
And so, the trial run is held shortly after...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: YAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, sorry! There's no way we can do this!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Running with her is way too scary!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian! Stop scowling and yelling like that! This is
only a practice run—tone it down!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I can turn down the volume, but I can't turn down
my face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You have a point, but we can't continue the
trial like this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps we can do something about this image of
yours to prevent further misunderstandings...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Ah! I've come up with the perfect idea! You
two—let me share a little story with you.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: A story?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It will interest you to know that Brian was quite
the crybaby when she was little.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey! What the hell?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if she still needs it, but she wasn't
able to sleep without her stuffed animal. What
was it called again?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Stop! Why are you saying this?! Have you lost
your mind?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...The point is, I want you to understand that
Brian is like any other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She becomes frightened and, as you can see,
embarrassed—just like the rest of us. So you don't
have to be afraid of her.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right. I guess we got all spooked
over nothing.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Thanks for that. Okay, we're ready to run!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Whatever. Let's get on with it already!
With that, they successfully finish their test run.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, it's been a while since anyone dared to
humiliate me like that. You've got some nerve!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. But if I hadn't, they would have been
too frightened to run.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The best way to get closer to people is through
laughter. Besides, don't you think it's good that
they're not afraid of you anymore?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You sure know how to spin things.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Just know that I'll remember this. I have a
few stories about you too, Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Like when we went to an amusement park for the
first time...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: H-hold on, Brian! Bringing that up is out of line!
